diffs.diff:
--- a/read_source7.py
+++ b/read_source7.py
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+import os

+os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

+

+path = 'habitat-lab/habitat/tasks/rearrange/social_nav/social_nav_sensors.py'

+with open(path) as f:

+    lines = f.readlines()

+

+# Print the FULL SocialNavSeekSuccess class - lines 466 to 580

+print('=== SocialNavSeekSuccess FULL CLASS ===')

+for i in range(465, min(580, len(lines))):

+    print(f'{i+1:4d}: {lines[i]}', end='')

+

+# Also check what happens with must_call_stop in the update_metric

+print('\n\n=== Searching for must_call_stop in entire file ===')

+for i, line in enumerate(lines):

+    if 'must_call_stop' in line or 'call_stop' in line:

+        s = max(0, i-2)

+        e = min(len(lines), i+3)

+        for j in range(s, e):

+            print(f'{j+1:4d}: {lines[j]}', end='')

+        print('---')

+

+# Check DoesWantTerminate in rearrange_sensors.py

+print('\n\n=== DoesWantTerminate full class ===')

+import glob

+for fpath in glob.glob('habitat-lab/habitat/tasks/rearrange/**/*.py', recursive=True):

+    with open(fpath) as f:

+        content = f.read()

+    if 'class DoesWantTerminate' in content:

+        clines = content.split('\n')

+        for i, line in enumerate(clines):

+            if 'class DoesWantTerminate' in line:

+                s = i

+                e = min(len(clines), i+60)

+                for j in range(s, e):

+                    print(f'  {j+1:4d}: {clines[j]}')

+                break

+        break
